Belt of Virtue  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WAIST
AC: 8
STR: +5 WIS: +5
SV MAGIC: +5
Haste: +16%
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: PAL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Belt of Virtue
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WAIST
AC: 8
STR: +5 WIS: +5
SV MAGIC: +5
Haste: +16%
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: PAL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Rann Dragonsbane and Scrith Swiftblade
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-08-02 07:50:05
Page Updated:Sun Aug 15th, 2021

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Comments ]

a thunder spirit princess
an azarack

heart harpie

The Spiroc Lord

Plane of Sky

Haste.
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2005 at 11:11 AM Rating: Decent
tsdeane
Scholar
47 posts
evidently this haste on this belt goes up as you gain levels. my pally got it and it almost doubles my speed at level 51. i think 16% is the lowest you get. i would hazzard a guess of 50% at level 51.

Drop on the isle with pegasus ( 4 ).

We kill around 5 of the mob in this island and belt drop 3 times...

We kill the Keeper of Souls too :) really fun fight when all the MT DT'ed :D

1 post
got one my self lol it is better than my fbss
▲ Page top
Level Of Effect?
QuoteReply
# May 28 2002 at 11:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251924332
Scholar
303 posts
I purchased one of these at level 40 from a generous level 60 cleric (not no-drop on FV server). I've been toying around with taking it on and off. However, I honestly cannot notice any speed difference whether it is on or off. Given that this is from the Plane of Air, does this worn-haste effect not work until level 46?

Edited, Wed May 29 00:31:46 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Level Of Effect?
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2003 at 12:53 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591765923498
Guru
170 posts
The haste takes effect at any level. This belt in particular gives you 16% Haste, so you're going to swing 16% more than normal. Depending on the delay of your weapon, you might not notice a significant difference but believe me there IS. Keep it on. :)
▲ Page top
Belt and Haste
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2002 at 12:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780128791
84 posts
This belt is nice, i would wear it over my FBSS. 8ac, 5str, 5wis, 5mr and 16% v 21% i would take the ac, stats, and haste. An easier way to figure out haste is just take the haste on an item and put 1. in front of it then divide it by weapons delay. So, on the Sword of the Morning for example it would be 27/1.21= 23 delay. Just fyi the delay would be the same with fbss or belt of virtue.. but you get the ac and stats with virtue. On higher delay weapons the fbss haste would cut a few more delay off a weapon then BoV. Also, here is a list of haste percents which is pretty accurate http://pub38.ezboard.com/fmonklybusiness43508frm3.showMessage?topicID=5085.topic

Edited, Sun Mar 31 00:22:47 2002
▲ Page top
got one tonight
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2002 at 6:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770579126
View User Forum
3 posts
I got one of these tonight, the haste is the same as fbss, but the stats just make this thing flat out own. gave my old fbss to a guildy for 1k. im not plat hungry.
▲ Page top
Haste
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 10:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361523466
45 posts
Actually they lowered FBSS speed to 16, 17%. So this has same speed as FBSS now. And the way to figure out the dly on yer weap using speed is as follows...100% dly would lower dly 1/2 of weapon dly. 200% cuts it in 1/2 of 100% speed, or 1/4 of unspeeded melee, and so on and so forth. Soo...16.666% is 1/6 of 100 so this will lower dly 1/12 of weapons original dly, at least this is what i've been told. I really wish i could get this haste item, 8ac, 5str 5wis and 5magic (can't go wrong with these stats), signed up for a few PoA raids to try and get one
▲ Page top
Drops
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 7:27 AM Rating: Decent
ArcturionDragoran
View User Forum
Scholar
58 posts
Actualy all the class specific haste belts that are droppped in PoS are random off of any mob. Had a monk belt drop on the first Island while we were getting key pieces, lucky monk :p
As for whether or not FBSS is better for Paladin or this belt? AC is king numero uno, and 2 it has stat bonuses as well as a decent haste effect. Paladins should not be main tanks in most cases at the level neded to get these, so why worry about the haste percentage? If it makes me kill faster and I don't have to hang out in L Guk so much the better. Next best thing for Paladins only is the PoS quest belt.
If ya got an RBB or CoF or some other such uber haste item, well good on ya and have fun. The rest of us would realy like to get one of these so stay outta the randoms plz thx.

Update: Got one after hanging out in PoS farming the Spiroc Lord for some warrior friends of mine. Very nice item indead. :p
____________________________
Arcturion Obiwanshinobi
Paladin Extraordinare

Luuke
Ubermonk

Stasis
Prexus Server
▲ Page top
RE: Drops
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 10:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762612188
111 posts

Err...that AC god stuff starts to wear thin at 50+ levels I am finding. Resist...Resist become VERY important. To paraphrase a quote I found somewhere on this site: Who cares if your AC is 1041 if your charmed **** is killing the chanter.

Speed is nice also. Extremely important to take down MOBs asap. Yes, that is what nukers are for you say....and you are correct. Sometimes it takes a few secs to launch those babies..and fast, hard-hitting melee damage is welcomed.

Amosk
51st Paladin of the Underfoot
Dru-Ro

QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2001 at 9:41 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591754055236
Sage
140 posts
All the class specific haste belts are random drops, from anything on the second level and above, becoming more common as you get higher. On the first level, however, the Thunder Spirit Princess can drop them rarely. I believe that the haste on these belts is actually less than an FBSS...

# Feb 19 2001 at 7:47 PM Rating: Default

Anonymous
16% haste...not as good as fbss, but this has ac, str, wis, and sv magic....having an enchanter in almost EVERY group Im in now, I could care less about the 5% less haste on this, I love it, great stats, untill I get a Girdle of Faith (kicks eye of veeshan), just gotta get to the last island in air =) Good luck....
▲ Page top
16% dmg inc. or 13.8% delay reduct.
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2001 at 12:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245580516
5 posts
The haste on this belt is 16% increse in damage or a 13.8% reduction in delay. (they equal the same thing) FBSS is a 21% increase in damage for comparison. If you want to convert it take 1.21 and divide 1 by that number to get the new delay multiplier. FBSS has a 17.4% reduction in delay for example.
